avatar.container: width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(245,101,101,0.3); border: 2px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.5);

header.userName: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 800; color: #F56565; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase;

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #FC8181; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.4); background: rgba(26,26,26,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap; text-transform: uppercase;

h2.base: margin: 0; font-size: 1.6em; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.4; text-transform: uppercase;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #F6E05E; background: rgba(246,224,94,0.15); padding: 0 4px; font-weight: 600;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #CBD5E0; line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 500;

code.block: background: #2D2D2D; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #F56565; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(245,101,101,0.1);
code.inline: background: #2D2D2D; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: #F56565; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; border: 1px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.2);

styles.quote: border-left: 4px solid #F56565; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #FC8181; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(245,101,101,0.05);
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(245,101,101,0.15);
styles.link: color: #F6E05E; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(246,224,94,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease; font-weight: 600;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.3);
table.header: background: #2D2D2D; font-weight: 700; color: #F56565; padding: 12px; text-transform: uppercase;

styles.hr: border: none; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F56565, #F6E05E); margin: 28px 0; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(245,101,101,0.2);
